ads.title: Exhibit Supply Dale Gun arcade machine, Circa 1950
ads.description: This is a complete machine, but was missing gun unit when I first acquired this machine. I later found the gun assembly, it has coin unit and mechanics, however I'm selling as a parts machine or serious project. This was the first mechanical gun game which uses "finger contacts" under the gun that run on a board with rivets. When the gun aligns properly it hits the target. All subsequent mechanical gun games used this same principle. Has four targets inside the machine. If yo... See more

Condition: • Like New: Meticulously maintained, stored indoors, and runs perfectly. • Clean, no scuffs, and all electronic components are 100% functional. Price: $1500 (Open to reasonable offers) Location: Odessa FL Pickup: Local pickup only. Happy to show you it works before you take it home! Message me if you're interested or have any questions! ads.author: David Bolton
ads.title: Pinball machine Hokus Pokus 1975 owned since 1979
ads.description: Edit March 20 We moved into new place and something happened along the way where it is no longer resetting. When you hit the reset button it makes a noise like it's going from one to two player but nothing resets. I know it's something minor. I have lowered the price considerably. Had every switch , blade and contact filed and cleaned and machine shopped out in 2021 by Terri Irwin , a long time respected pinball mechanic in Ocala. Has a few lights out. Only issue is sometimes the score reel does not completely set over and you have to hit the button again to restart it. One of those Ghost in the machine kind of things that she just couldn't figure out . I have owned this game since 1979 when I received it as a kid. You might have seen this up for sale in the past and then the listing disappeared. This was a period of time when I needed money for something so I put it up for sale but then something else came through and I took it down because I didn't really want to sell it. At this point in life it is mostly just nostalgia. I just don't play it anymore. It is very fun game I am just bored with it after 45 years and want something different. Very open to trades for a newer pinball machine plus cash on my end. Thanks for looking! Nine zero four four four four one four three nine.. Dave

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988 (Project Cab)
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $200 (or best offer) This is a Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet in a Centipede Cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $200, or best offer - Serious buyers only. Price Breakdown: Capcom Bowling PCS ($40) Control Panel and Trackball ($60) Cabinet ($100) CRT (dunno if its dead so $0?) Wiring, coin door, misc ($40)

ads.description: Machine works, guns work, sound works, turns on but needs someone who can fix the screen. Doesn’t look to be a hard fix, machine is worth over 3k when running properly : 1. Single Horizontal Line (Vertical Collapse) If the screen is black with a single, bright horizontal line across the middle, this is known as vertical collapse. Reddit Reddit Cause: A failure in the monitor's vertical deflection circuit, often caused by dried-out or bad electrolytic capacitors. Fix: A "cap kit" (capacitor replacement) for the monitor chassis is typically required. Can deliver for additional fee.

It's considered a spiritual successor to Ivan "Ironman" Stewart's Super Off Road, featuring modes like circuit racing where players earn cash to upgrade performance parts like suspension and tires, and multiplayer split-screen action. The game includes various obstacles like trains and UFOs, and tracks set in locations like the Mojave Desert and Las Vegas Dm me for more details

ads.author: Rowdy Taylor
ads.title: 1971 Williams STARDUST Pinball - Beautiful Vintage Condition & 100% Functional
ads.description: Up for sale is a classic 1971 Williams Stardust 4-player electro-mechanical pinball machine. This isn't a "warehouse find" or a project—it is a well-loved, fully serviced machine that plays exactly as it should. I’ve spent considerable time overhauling the mechanicals and detailing the aesthetics to ensure it’s ready for its next home. It has that perfect "vintage soul"—it shows some minor signs of play and history, but it’s clean, fast, and reliable. All score reels and relay switches have been cleaned and adjusted. The playfield was stripped, deep-cleaned, and hand-polished to remove years of dullness. It’s been finished with High-Carnauba Paste Wax for a smooth, protected surface. 100% new white rubber kit installed. I also added brand new matching locks for the coin door and backbox. The original 1971 artwork has been cleaned and treated to preserve the colors and wood. This machine still has its original factory schematics and paperwork—a huge bonus for collectors and essential for long-term care. The machine is in excellent shape for being 55 years old. It has some "signs of love" (minor character wear) that prove it’s been enjoyed, but it remains a beautiful, vibrant centerpiece. Ready to Play- No errors, no stuck reels, and no "project" headaches. Just plug it in and hit the flippers. Comes with various extra parts- Fuses, lights, rubbers, etc. Price: $1,200 (OBO) Location: Lower Garden District, New Orleans

ads.description: Silent Scope 2: Dark Silhouette arcade cabinet in excellent working condition. Everything works exactly as it should. The screen is bright, the scope is accurate, and controls are responsive. Major upgrade, no more failure risk. This machine has been upgraded with FRAM (FM18W08-PG), eliminating the original Timekeeper RAM / “suicide chip” issue that causes many of these to fail over time. This means no battery dependency, no data loss, and long-term reliability. Features: Fully tested and 100% working Original dedicated cabinet (not a conversion) Scope tracks accurately Strong picture and sound Clean and well-maintained This is a plug-and-play arcade classic, ideal for a home game room or collector. Asking $1,400 OBO Located in Buford Pickup only – I can help load These are getting harder to find in fully working condition with this upgrade. Serious inquiries only

ads.description: Up for sale is a beautiful 1974 Gottlieb Top Card pinball machine. I am listing this machine, along with another pitch and bat machine for a friend who is not on social media. This game has undergone a ground up restoration, with the cabinet being repainted using professional stencils back to its original graphics. The game has been cleaned and restored mechanically and plays great! The playfield is in great condition, as is the back glass. This game was originally purchased from an operator who removed it from his route back in the day, after only a few months, due to someone damaging the front door in an attempt to break it. The game only has 13,xxx plays on it, due to being in storage for 50 years. The game has a new reproduction front door, legs, and many other parts. It is a beautiful game which must be seen in person and played. If interested, please contact me and I can put you in touch with the owner for any arrangements. Asking $1,900 OBO. Cash only. ads.author: Tommy Myers
ads.title: Vintage 1982 Atari Dig Dug Stand-Up Arcade Cabinet – Fully Working & Ready to Blast!
ads.description: Step into the golden age of arcades with this authentic 1982 Atari Dig Dug upright cabinet! This is the real deal — not a mini, not a replica, not a conversion. It’s a genuine vintage stand-up machine straight from the era when arcades ruled. Dig Dug is pure addictive fun: burrow through colorful underground tunnels, pump up the Pookas and Fygars until they explode, or drop rocks on them for massive points. Crisp graphics, thumping original sounds, responsive joystick and buttons — it plays exactly like you remember from the 80s! Condition: In great working condition with no issues. Everything fires up perfectly — screen is bright and clear, controls are tight, sound is loud and spot-on. No flickering, no dead spots, no repairs needed. It’s been well-maintained and is ready to provide endless entertainment right out of the box. This cabinet is a show-stopper for any: • Game room • Man cave • Basement bar • Retro collector’s lineup These original dedicated 1982 uprights are getting rarer every year, especially in solid working shape like this one. Price: $1,900 or best offer Local pickup only (cash preferred). It’s a big, heavy classic (roughly 72" tall), so bring a friend or a truck — happy to help load it! Serious buyers only — message me anytime with questions or to set up a time to come test it out and play a few rounds. First come, first served. #DigDug #VintageArcade #Atari1982 #RetroGaming #ArcadeCabinet #ClassicArcade

ads.author: Benjamin Cook
ads.title: 1996 Sega Wave Runner Arcade Machine
ads.description: *If it's up, it's available. Local pickup near Boiling Springs SC. Electronic payments (Cash app, venmo, zelle etc) are not accepted. Cash only please* I had planned on restoring this arcade machine but life got in the way. It powers on and works to an extent but it needs TLC to get it fully functional. The picture convergence needs help. The jet ski needs an air compressor to make the ride functional which is missing so I never could test it. There's also a piece of aluminum trim on the left side of the jet ski that was missing when I got it. The Sega Model 2 inside has been replaced so the old one is included. You will need to bring a trailer with a ramp to load it. Both pieces are on wheels so it's relatively easy to move but very heavy.

ads.title: Original Lethal Enforcers Arcade Cabinet (For Sale or Trade) Works Great!!!
ads.description: I have an original 1990's Lethal Enforcers Arcade cabinet in great working and cosmetic condition that I am looking to sell or possibly trade. Everything works as it should. This game is very fun to play but its time to find it a new home. I am asking $1750 or possibly will trade. I look for vintage watches, gold/silver coins and jewelry, retro video games and more. Send me a message with what you have and maybe we can work out a deal. Pickup in Hammond.

Would be a great for a total restore. $800 Pickup in Clarkson KY. As always trade in are welcome on pinballs or arcades working or not.

ads.author: Israel Logsdon
ads.title: Vindicators Dedicated Arcade Machine
ads.description: Vindicators Dedicated Arcade machine. Everything has Been tested & 100% working, Set to Take Quarters, With new locks and keys, monitor is bright and crisp. Cab little Rough not to bad, Open to trades on pinball or Arcade machines working or not. Pickup in Clarkson Ky.

ads.author: Mike Sullivan
ads.title: 1976 Gottlieb Target Alpha EM Pinball Machine
ads.description: I have just completed bringing this machine back to life and everthing works and plays properly. All rubber bands are new. Schematics, manual, instructions, spare score cards are included. Machine is in great shape for being 50 years old. Backglass is near perfect and playfield and plastic shields are all in great shape. For local pickup and can ship if you make all arrangements for crating, packing, and shipping. Will consider trade for other EM or Electronic machine/s. I have more pictures available and can take others upon request.

ads.author: Joseph Whitaker
ads.title: Daytona USA 2 Arcade Game
ads.description: Machine works. We play it daily. BUT redoing the shop and not gonna have room for it. We unplugged the speakers but they do work. All the way down was still kinda loud. Force feedback i think came unplugged. Worked in my mancave. Then we moved it to the shop and then is stopped. Shifter works as it should. Pedals work as they should. Monitor looks great. Solid game. Has cosmetic wear. But its time to pass it on to someone else. Located in Rock Hill SC. Price is negotiable. Will take trades on Pinball machines. Have other games I could add for the right pinball or other cool items thanks for looking.

ads.author: Joseph Whitaker
ads.title: Arcade games!!!
ads.description: Redoing my mancave so selling these off. Golden Tee $750 Road Riot 4wd SOLD SOLD SOLD Area 51/Max Force (monitor wont come on) $250 Come play them before you buy. Located in Rock Hill SC.

Never seen one of these before so just going by what I see Pick up Thomas cove Dr groveland FL. We will assist in shipping. You can send your own shipping company in or we work with Woody's haul and ace in shipping machines. Cabinet is in great shape just missing parts sold as is. If post is up it's available

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: Daytona USA - Working Twincab
ads.description: Fully working Daytona Twin Cab; played great. Player 2 CRT tinted slightly green and could use adjustment/repairs but head to head racing works great. Played great in our arcade, but ready to retire to someone else's arcade or for home usage. Card readers will be removed at purchase. Can be set to free play or set up with new readers / coin system.

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: Hang On Project Cab
ads.description: Non working project cab. Cabinet is in great shape but someone stuck an LCD inside with a VGA connection. Includes the board but gets artifacting on power up / display. Board could be repaired.

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: Neo Geo in Dynamo Cab
ads.description: Working Neo Geo cab with multi cart. Works great! Used to have a card reader; can be set to free play for home use.

ads.author: Cory Anderson
ads.title: Carnival Arcade Game
ads.description: I have Carnival arcade game made by Gremlin/Sega in 1980 . Game plays great. I will not answer questions in the comments section. PM me if you interested. Asking $900.00 Firm. Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.author: Keith Swanson
ads.title: Blitz 99 original commercial Arcade Machine
ads.description: I am selling my Original Blitz 99 arcade. New NOS crt monitor installed. Perfect picture. Cabinet in good shape ( some dings on it nothing major ) plays perfect. Offered by Arcade Doctor of Orlando.

ads.author: Mario Bucheli
ads.title: Area 51 Site 4 Full-Size Arcade Cabinet – Dynamo Z Back - Good Condition
ads.description: Selling my Area 51: Site 4 full-size arcade cabinet in nice condition. Original game running on board/PCB inside a Dynamo Z Back cabinet. Usual wear and tear from normal use, but overall clean and presents well. Monitor is pristine and the marquee lights up. Includes/Features: -Area 51: Site 4 full-size arcade cabinet -Game board/PCB (not an emulation build) -Dynamo cabinet -Brand new guns installed (working) -Pristine monitor -Light-up marquee -Sound and gameplay fully functional Fully assembled and ready to play. Downsizing my game room. All cabinets are from a private collection. Check my profile for other machines. Will consider bundle pricing for serious buyers.

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.author: Aiden Gabriel Phoenix

ads.description: track and field arcade great condition , new power supply clean cabinet and crisp CRT

ads.author: Scott Knighton
ads.title: Williams MISS-O Pinball Machine
ads.description: Vintage Williams MISS-O pinball machine. Super cool retro pool-themed artwork on the backglass and playfield. Lights are on, ready to play! Has coin slots for nickels and dimes, plus flipper buttons on both sides. Great piece for a game room.

ads.description: For sale is this original 1981 Galaga Arcade game. I have personally owed this machine for over 30 years. It has been in my personal collection for this time (not Arcade Used). This machine is fully functional and has new locks and keys on coin box and back access panel. Please note this is an original Galaga Arcade Game from 1981. It may have some cabinet scratches and scuff marks etc. (Please see pictures). Game Dimensions: H: 68′′, W: 25′′, D: 27′′ Weight approx. 190 lbs Local pickup or seller will assist if buyer provides, arranges, and pays for shipping company. Price : $1500 OBO
